Video.summary: Investigating the murder of a famous actress, Hunter follows a killer to Mexico, and learns of CIA interest.
Video.title: Naked Justice, Part 2

Video.summary: Captain Devane investigates his ex-wife's murder and violates his forced leave of absence to pursue the killer
Video.title: Girl On The Beach

Video.summary: A Colombian drug dealer is murdered, and police informant Sporty James becomes the prime suspect.
Video.title: The Bogota Million

Video.summary: The investigation of the stabbing of a deaf man hinges on clues the man gave in sign language before he died.
Video.title: Death Signs

Video.summary: The wife of a dead businessman becomes the prime suspect when it's discovered she was removed from his will.
Video.title: Boomerang

Video.summary: Hunter investigates the missing money from an old bust that implicates the police in criminal activity.
Video.title: The Fourth Man

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a multi-millionaire, whose four heirs become prime suspects.
Video.title: Murder He Wrote

Video.summary: The only clue in a series of murders leads Hunter and McCall to suspect a colleague as the killer.
Video.title: Silver Bullet

Video.summary: The case of a teenager who mistakenly shot his parents during what he claimed was a home invasion.
Video.title: Heir Of Neglect

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall find the murdered body of a call girl, and a toddler left unharmed in front of her tv set.
Video.title: The Baby Game

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 2

Video.summary: Loyalties are tested when Hunter jeopardizes a case prosecuted by the Assistant DA, whom McCall loves.
Video.title: Presumed Guilty

Video.summary: Mysterious recordings accusing a powerful company of dumping toxic waste seem like a prank, until the killings
Video.title: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Image.alt: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Video.summary: Hunter confronts the entire police department to defend the actions of a Chinese-American policewoman.
Video.title: Honorable Profession

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall cope with the double and triple-crossing of a criminal who once saved Hunter's life.
Video.title: Payback

Video.summary: When the husband of a policewoman is murdered, Hunter and McCall suspect the woman's patrol partner.
Video.title: Partners

Video.summary: A dispatcher is blackmailed into undermining Hunter's and McCall's investigation of a gold robbery.
Video.title: The Pit

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 3

Video.summary: A bizarre murder is a biochemist's effort to conceal the killing of a woman's husband in order to win her.
Video.title: Me, Myself & Die

Video.summary: When Hunter refuses to reveal an informant to a Grand Jury, he is sent to jail, as a convicted murder is freed
Video.title: Informant

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow the trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a racehorse.
Video.title: Blood Line

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a string of robberies, pursue the thieves, and shoot a man who may be innocent.
Video.title: Shoot To Kill

Video.summary: McCall can't believe that a trauma specialist who once treated her, began drinking again and killed herself.
Video.title: Code 3
